title: synth for ECP5, inferred true dual port ram is not allocated DP16KD ram

features.name: true dual-port RAM with unpacked array memory
features.description: Code should include a true dual-port RAM with parameterized DATA and ADDR, using an unpacked array declaration where both ports perform synchronous read/write operations

features.name: dual-clock independent port RAM
features.description: Code should include a RAM with two independent ports each having separate clock, write enable, address, and data signals, where both ports access the same memory array

features.name: memory initialization with readmemh
features.description: Code should include a memory array with an initial block that loads contents using $readmemh, which can affect RAM inference behavior in synthesis tools
